rationale: Wrap the prelude in `if (full antecedent) { ... }` so every per-run ensures conjunct of proc_push_thread lands on the path condition (the previous attempt's lemma calls fired at the implication-antecedent level and never resolved the cross-run forall triggers). Inside the branch: discharge `owned_threads.view() == .view()` with `lemma_owned_threads_view_eq` plus `seq_push_lemma`; merge the two disjointly-triggered `forall|v|` get_node_ref ensures via `lemma_get_node_ref_aligned_threadptr` under a single trigger `post1.get_node_ref(v), post2.get_node_ref(v)`; and chain each field's `post*.X =~= pre.X` through `pre.X` so the matching `==` / `.view() == .view()` / `is Some` / `->Some_0` conjuncts of det_proc_push_thread_equal close uniformly.
